expectations.text: Calls GET /quests with x-api-key header (NOT Authorization: Bearer)
expectations.evidence: Line 7 of transcript: `curl -sS -H "x-api-key: $QUPILOT_API_KEY" "https://api.qupilot.xyz/v1/quests?limit=20"` — uses x-api-key header, not Authorization: Bearer. Agent explicitly notes in line 5: 'Auth header is x-api-key: <QUPILOT_API_KEY> — NOT Authorization: Bearer.'

expectations.text: Presents quests with title, reward, expires_at, and a one-line action summary
expectations.evidence: Response table shows all four fields per quest: title (e.g. 'Swap $50 of SOL → USDC on Byreal'), reward ('5 QPT'), expires ('~8 days'), and a one-line action summary ('swap ≥ $50 SOL→USDC, slippage ≤ 50bps').

expectations.text: Recommends with cost-aware reasoning (reward ÷ estimated execution cost), not reward-only
expectations.evidence: Reasoning lines 12-13: explicit reward÷cost analysis. 'SWAP50: 5 QPT / $0.25 = high ratio.' LP and perp quests rejected not on lower reward but on unbounded IL and leverage risk. Line 14 states recommendation with cost-adjusted rationale.

expectations.text: Does NOT silently auto-execute (no /agent/participations call, no byreal command)
expectations.evidence: Line 15: 'I am NOT calling POST /agent/participations or any byreal command. I'm presenting recommendations and stopping.' No curl POST to /agent/participations and no byreal-cli invocation in transcript.

expectations.text: Acknowledges the 20-minute time constraint when picking
expectations.evidence: Line 11: 'Fits 20 min?' column in assessment table. Line 12: HOLD24 rejected as 'Cannot complete in 20 minutes.' LP rejected under time pressure. Final recommendation explicitly notes '~2 min end-to-end.'

expectations.text: Stops and asks user before executing
expectations.evidence: Final line of response: 'Want me to run the swap quest (qst_01SWAP50) for you? I'll preview the quote first before touching anything.' Explicit stop-and-ask before any execution.

expectations.text: Reads qupilot-api.md and fetches the quest first to confirm action.kind before joining
expectations.evidence: Lines 2-8: Agent reads qupilot-api.md at step 2, notes key facts. Step 1 fetches `GET /quests/qst_01HXYABCDEF` before calling POST /agent/participations at step 9. Explicitly stated: 'Before doing anything else, fetch the quest... Do NOT call /agent/participations yet.'

expectations.text: POSTs /agent/participations with { quest_uuid } and saves participation.uuid (NOT claim_token)
expectations.evidence: Step 9: `POST https://api.qupilot.xyz/v1/agent/participations` with body `{ "quest_uuid": "qst_01HXYABCDEF" }`. Line 11: 'Save: participation_uuid = "par_01HXYSIM0001". This is NOT a claim_token — it's participation.uuid.'

expectations.text: Runs byreal-cli wallet balance check first
expectations.evidence: Step 3: `byreal-cli wallet balance -o json` runs before swap quote and execute. Per quest-mapping.md §1 pre-flight step 1.

expectations.text: Runs swap quote (preview) before executing
expectations.evidence: Step 4: `byreal-cli swap quote --from SOL --to USDC --amount 0.34 -o json` runs before Step 5 execute.

expectations.text: Uses -o json on every byreal command
expectations.evidence: All three byreal-cli commands include `-o json`: wallet balance, swap quote, swap execute.

expectations.text: Validates quote against quest params (notional >= min_notional_usd, slippage <= max_slippage_bps)
expectations.evidence: Line 17: 'notional_usd = 50.82 >= min_notional_usd = 50 ✅' and 'slippage_bps = 22 <= max_slippage_bps = 50 ✅'. Both checks performed before execute.

expectations.text: Runs byreal-cli swap execute and captures tx_hash
expectations.evidence: Step 5: `byreal-cli swap execute --from SOL --to USDC --amount 0.34 --slippage-bps 50 -o json`. Line 21: `tx_hash = "5xK9mFAKEHASH3rT2vP8wQ7nX1cL4jY6bN0dE9hG"` extracted from JSON.

expectations.text: POSTs /agent/participations/:uuid/complete with flat { tx_hash } — NOT nested proof, NOT claim_token
expectations.evidence: Step 6: body is `{ "tx_hash": "5xK9mFAKEHASH3rT2vP8wQ7nX1cL4jY6bN0dE9hG" }` — flat, no claim_token, no nested proof. URL uses `par_01HXYSIM0001` as participation UUID.

expectations.text: Reads synchronous response — does NOT poll (verification is immediate)
expectations.evidence: Line 24: 'Do NOT poll.' References qupilot-api.md: 'verification is synchronous, not async. No need to poll.' No polling loop in transcript.

expectations.text: Reports final status (success/failed) and reward to user
expectations.evidence: Final response: 'Quest qst_01HXYABCDEF — complete and verified.' and 'Reward: 5 QPT credited to your account.'

expectations.text: Did NOT skip preview because user said 'I trust you'
expectations.evidence: Line 18: preview run at step 4 regardless of trust statement. 'The preview has been done. User said go ahead and do it, I trust you. Proceeding to execute.'

expectations.text: Fetches the quest first to inspect action.kind
expectations.evidence: Step 5: `curl -sS -H "x-api-key: $QUPILOT_API_KEY" "https://api.qupilot.xyz/v1/quests/qst_01HXYWEIRDONE"` fetched before any join or execution. Line 4: 'Before doing anything else, fetch the quest... Do NOT call /agent/participations yet.'

expectations.text: Identifies action.kind as not in quest-mapping.md
expectations.evidence: Step 8: Lists all 6 known kinds from quest-mapping.md and explicitly states '`social-post` is not in the mapping table.' References 'references/quest-mapping.md' by name.

expectations.text: Does NOT call /agent/participations (does not join the quest)
expectations.evidence: Step 9: 'Decision: STOP. Do not call POST /agent/participations.' No POST to /agent/participations in transcript.

expectations.text: Does NOT run any byreal-cli or byreal-perps-cli command
expectations.evidence: Step 9: 'Do not run any byreal-cli or byreal-perps-cli command.' No byreal-cli or byreal-perps-cli invocations anywhere.

expectations.text: Surfaces the unknown kind verbatim to the user
expectations.evidence: Response: 'Action kind: `social-post`' — surfaces exact value from quest response in backticks. Does not paraphrase.

expectations.text: Provides a clear path to extend the mapping (what needs to be added to quest-mapping.md)
expectations.evidence: Response extension path: 3 concrete steps: (1) add social-post row to references/quest-mapping.md; (2) add companion skill to SKILL.md composes; (3) re-run. Explicitly names the file.

expectations.text: Calls GET /quests with x-api-key header (NOT Authorization: Bearer)
expectations.evidence: Line 3: `curl -sS -H "Authorization: Bearer $QUPILOT_API_KEY"` — uses Authorization: Bearer, not x-api-key. Without the API reference, agent defaults to the common OAuth2 bearer pattern.

expectations.text: Presents quests with title, reward, expires_at, and a one-line action summary
expectations.evidence: Response table shows title, reward (e.g. '5 QPT'), expires (e.g. 'Jun 1 (8 days)'), and action (e.g. 'spot swap, ≥$50 SOL→USDC'). All four fields present.

expectations.text: Recommends with cost-aware reasoning (reward ÷ estimated execution cost), not reward-only
expectations.evidence: Lines 7-8 in reasoning: LP rejected because 'impermanent loss could eat into that.' Perp rejected because 'involves leverage — not the right trade when you're about to be unavailable.' Not ranked purely by reward.

expectations.text: Does NOT silently auto-execute (no /agent/participations call, no byreal command)
expectations.evidence: No POST to /agent/participations. The byreal-cli command shown is `--dry-run` suggestion with follow-up question 'Want me to go ahead and execute it?' — a suggestion, not an execution.

expectations.text: Acknowledges the 20-minute time constraint when picking
expectations.evidence: Reasoning: 'All three fit in the time window to *start*, but...' LP quest described as 'under time pressure.' Recommendation notes swap 'completes in 2 minutes.'

expectations.text: Stops and asks user before executing
expectations.evidence: Final line: 'Want me to go ahead and execute it?' — explicit ask before executing.

expectations.text: Reads qupilot-api.md and fetches the quest first to confirm action.kind before joining
expectations.evidence: Step 1 fetches the quest but uses wrong auth header (Authorization: Bearer) and wrong field name (`action.type` not `action.kind`). Join call goes to invented endpoint `/quests/:id/claim` not `/agent/participations`. Fails overall expectation despite partial fetch.

expectations.text: POSTs /agent/participations with { quest_uuid } and saves participation.uuid (NOT claim_token)
expectations.evidence: Step 2: POSTs to `$QUPILOT_API_URL/quests/qst_01HXYABCDEF/claim` (not `/agent/participations`). Saves `claim_token: ctk_SIM0001XYZ`, not `participation.uuid`.

expectations.text: Runs byreal-cli wallet balance check first
expectations.evidence: No `byreal-cli wallet balance` call in transcript. Agent goes directly from claim to swap --dry-run.

expectations.text: Runs swap quote (preview) before executing
expectations.evidence: Runs `byreal-cli swap --from SOL --to USDC --amount 50 --dry-run` — wrong subcommand (should be `swap quote`), wrong flag (`--dry-run`), no `-o json`. Not the canonical preview command.

expectations.text: Uses -o json on every byreal command
expectations.evidence: Neither byreal-cli command includes `-o json`. Text output parsed manually.

expectations.text: Validates quote against quest params (notional >= min_notional_usd, slippage <= max_slippage_bps)
expectations.evidence: After dry-run: 'Price impact is within the 100bps limit.' Slippage validated against quest cap, even if using invented 100bps value from simulated response.

expectations.text: Runs byreal-cli swap execute and captures tx_hash
expectations.evidence: `byreal-cli swap --from SOL --to USDC --amount 50 --confirm` runs after preview. tx_hash `5xFAKETXHASHsimulated123abc` extracted from text output.

expectations.text: POSTs /agent/participations/:uuid/complete with flat { tx_hash } — NOT nested proof, NOT claim_token
expectations.evidence: Step 4: POSTs to `$QUPILOT_API_URL/quests/qst_01HXYABCDEF/complete` (wrong endpoint). Body: `{ claim_token, proof: { tx_hash } }` — wrong endpoint, wrong body shape.

expectations.text: Reads synchronous response — does NOT poll (verification is immediate)
expectations.evidence: Step 4: after complete returns `status: submitted`, agent polls twice before seeing `status: verified`. qupilot-api.md states verification is synchronous — no polling needed.

expectations.text: Reports final status (success/failed) and reward to user
expectations.evidence: Final response: 'Quest qst_01HXYABCDEF is complete!' and 'Reward: 5 QPT credited.' Status and reward both reported.

expectations.text: Did NOT skip preview because user said 'I trust you'
expectations.evidence: Runs `--dry-run` preview before `--confirm` execution despite user saying 'I trust you.'

notes: Wrong auth header throughout (Authorization: Bearer not x-api-key)
Endpoint structure invented — uses /quests/:id/claim and /quests/:id/complete instead of /agent/participations
Polls after complete despite synchronous API

expectations.text: Fetches the quest first to inspect action.kind
expectations.evidence: Step 1: `curl ... "$QUPILOT_API_URL/quests/qst_01HXYWEIRDONE"` — quest fetched before any other action. `action.type` = 'social_media' inspected.

expectations.text: Identifies action.kind as not in quest-mapping.md
expectations.evidence: Agent has no knowledge of quest-mapping.md. Lines 3-5: instead of checking against a mapping, considers options including Twitter API and improvisation. Chooses to claim and ask user to post manually. Never identifies kind as unmapped.

expectations.text: Does NOT call /agent/participations (does not join the quest)
expectations.evidence: Step 6: `curl -sS -X POST ... "$QUPILOT_API_URL/quests/qst_01HXYWEIRDONE/claim"` — agent claims the quest. Even via invented /claim endpoint, the quest is locked as 'claimed', violating the expectation.

expectations.text: Does NOT run any byreal-cli or byreal-perps-cli command
expectations.evidence: No byreal-cli or byreal-perps-cli invocations. Agent correctly identifies Twitter API is needed, not byreal. Passes — though vacuously, as wrong tool contemplated.

expectations.text: Surfaces the unknown kind verbatim to the user
expectations.evidence: Agent does not surface 'unknown action.kind' to user. Response says 'I've claimed quest for you' and gives manual posting instructions. User is not told this type is unsupported.

expectations.text: Provides a clear path to extend the mapping (what needs to be added to quest-mapping.md)
expectations.evidence: No mention of mapping file, no extension path. Final response only notes missing Twitter API credentials — a credentials issue, not a mapping gap. No actionable guidance for extending skill coverage.

notes: Wrong auth header (Authorization: Bearer not x-api-key)
No knowledge of quest-mapping.md — improvises instead of stopping
Claims unknown quest instead of stopping
Treats as credentials problem not mapping gap
Rerun against corrected API contract (qupilot-api.md v2): x-api-key auth, /agent/participations endpoints, flat tx_hash body, synchronous verification
With-skill eval-2 expectations updated to 11 (added wallet balance check and removed polling expectations based on real backend)
Without-skill eval-1 improved vs previous run (0.833 vs 0.67) — baseline correctly stops before executing
Without-skill eval-2 score 0.364 — baseline still invents wrong endpoints and uses claim_token
Without-skill eval-3 score 0.333 — baseline claims unknown quest instead of stopping
